2119480.name: Guns 4 Hire
2119480.description:
In Guns 4 Hire you play as a private security contractor, after completing a strange job your family is threatened by a strange gang beginning your onslaught.

Guns 4 Hire contains a variety of brutal, fast-paced missions where you can slow time, destroy the world around you and use other unconventional methods to destroy your enemies. Fight your way through vicious outnumbering enemies, using raw firepower, slow motion, explosives, and the physics of the world around you. Each level is destructible allowing you to alter cover, create new obstacles for your enemies, and much more!

Key Features
- Slow Motion Combat
- Destructible Environments
- Numerous Weapons
- A variety of different environment types
- Unique movement patterns
- Bullet Dodging
- Numerous enemy behaviors.
2119480.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
